veterinary_anatomic_pathology: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("veterinary pathology" OR "anatomic pathology" OR histopathology OR histopathological) AND (veterinary OR animal OR canine OR feline OR bovine OR avian))
comparative_oncology: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("comparative oncology" OR "veterinary oncology") AND (pathology OR histopathology OR tumor OR tumour))
digital_pathology_ai: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("digital pathology" OR "computational pathology" OR "whole slide imaging") AND (veterinary OR animal) AND (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR "deep learning" OR pathology))
infectious_disease_pathology: TITLE-ABS-KEY((veterinary OR animal) AND (pathology OR histopathology) AND ("infectious disease" OR zoonosis OR zoonotic OR emerging))
